'''Kuep''' was a [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Corporal/Legends|corporal]] who served as a seasoned member of the [[Bespin Wing Guard/Legends|Cloud City security forces]]<ref name="JKTCG" /> during the early [[Standard year/Legends|years]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].<ref name="timeline">The [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of the ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'' is centered around the [[Original trilogy|original ''Star Wars'' trilogy]].</ref> Kuep was also a [[Miner/Legends|miner]] by trade and prospected [[Tibanna/Legends|Tibanna]] gas pockets while off duty. His<ref name="JKTCG" /> part-time mining job allowed for convenient meeting times with the [[Smuggler/Legends|smugglers]] at [[Cloud City/Legends|Cloud City]].<ref name="JKTCG2">{{JKTCG|set=Scum and Villainy|cardname=Corporal Kuep • Quick Draw|link=http://www.decipher.com/jediknights/cardlists/scumandvillainy/large/46fcorporalkuepquickdraw.html}}</ref> Kuep had [[Color/Legends|brown]] [[Hair/Legends|hair]] and fair skin.<ref name="JKTCG" />

==Behind the scenes==
Kuep was created for a card in the [[Premiere (Jedi Knights TCG)|''Premiere'']] set of [[Decipher]]'s ''[[Jedi Knights Trading Card Game]]'', released in [[2001]].<ref name="JKTCG" />
